updated: 初始資料 · 待 GitHub Actions 首次執行後自動更新

ortho.title: Orthokeratology for slowing myopic progression: long-term axial length outcomes
ortho.summary: 多中心追蹤支持角膜塑型對眼軸延緩之長期穩定性,配戴依從性與驗配品質為關鍵因子。

atropine.title: Low-concentration atropine (0.05%) for myopia control: extended-phase results
atropine.summary: 0.05% 於延伸期維持較佳之度數與眼軸延緩,停藥反彈幅度相對可控。

spectacle.title: Defocus-incorporated and aspherical-lenslet spectacles: real-world effectiveness
spectacle.summary: 真實世界資料支持離焦鏡片之延緩效益,足時全天配戴為效果之關鍵決定因子。

softcl.title: Dual-focus soft contact lenses initiated in younger children
softcl.summary: 較早起始配戴者累積延緩效益更佳,日拋設計之安全性表現良好。

redlight.title: Repeated low-level red-light therapy: efficacy and retinal safety monitoring
redlight.summary: 延緩效果顯著,惟建議搭配 OCT 定期監測以確保視網膜安全,長期資料仍在累積。

outdoor.title: Outdoor light exposure and myopia onset: an updated dose-response analysis
outdoor.summary: 戶外光照與近視發生率呈劑量-反應關係,對延緩『發生』之預防效益最為明確。
